name: rpass
description: Manage your pass-compatible password store with rpass. Cross-platform GPG encryption and TOTP support.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: vault
commands.title: Vault
commands.description: Browse, decrypt, and copy passwords from your pass-compatible vault.
commands.subtitle: rPass

preferences.name: rpassExecutablePath
preferences.title: rpass Executable Path
preferences.description: Path to the rpass binary. Leave empty if rpass is in PATH.

preferences.name: passwordStoreDir
preferences.title: Password Store Directory
preferences.description: Path to your password store. Default: ~/.password-store.

preferences.name: defaultAction
preferences.title: Default Action
preferences.description: Primary action when selecting a password entry.

preferences.name: clipboardTimeout
preferences.title: Clear Clipboard After
preferences.description: Automatically clear the clipboard after copying a password.

title: RPass
author: rxtsel
